description: Levite — he lives, his soul, he shall minister; Yahweh his God
mustContain: where he lives, and comes with all the desire of his soul
Then he shall minister in the name of Yahweh his God, as all his brothers the Levites do
mustNotContain: where He lives, and comes with all the desire of His soul
Then He shall minister in the name of Yahweh His God, as all His brothers
